name: social-autoposter
description: Draft, review, approve, and autopilot X/Twitter posts.
long_description:
## **⚠️ The disclaimer above is generic Claude boilerplate.** Anthropic shows the same warning on every plugin regardless of what it does; any plugin has the same level of access as any app you download from the internet.

S4L is an open source product developed by Mediar.ai Incorporated, a VC-backed San Francisco-based startup.

To get started:

1\. Copy this prompt: **Set me up on S4L plugin end to end**

2\. Quit with CMD+Q, reopen Claude, paste into a new chat.

What happens next:

* About every 5 minutes S4L scans X for posts that match your topics and drafts replies in your voice.
* Drafts show up as review cards, usually the first within a few minutes. Nothing is posted automatically; you approve each one.
* Posting autopilot stays off until you explicitly turn it on.

tools.name: engagement_mode
tools.description: Choose engagement lanes (personal brand + optional product promotion)

tools.name: restart_menubar
tools.description: Restart the S4L menu bar app
